info.title: Network Module
info.description: The Network module is designed for networks/denominations to manage the organisations they have links with. It facilitates storing information about a network of churches or organisations partnering with a charity.

tags.name: Custom Fields
tags.description: Custom Fields collect and manage information that doesn't fit in the module's standard or optional fields.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Key Dates
tags.description: Key Dates are an organisation's date-based milestones that you want to record and track over time.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Labels
tags.description: Labels are a way of categorising or grouping your organisations that share common attributes.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Members
tags.description: Link key contacts to organisations in your network.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Organisations
tags.description: Manage the various external organisations in your network that you partner with.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Roles are a useful way of distinguishing organisation members.

externalDocs.description: Explore our large database of online support articles for step-by-step help.

delete.description: Delete a single key date resource identified by an ID, removing an organisation from a key date.

put.description: Update a single key date resource identified by ID.

get.description: Returns a list of key date resources, optionally filtered by key date or organisation ID. A key date resource records an instance of a key date for an organisation on a given date.

parameters.name: key_date_ids[]
parameters.description: Filter records to those matching values in the provided array. This filter uses the logical OR operator.

parameters.name: organisation_ids[]
parameters.description: Filter records to those matching values in the provided array. This filter uses the logical OR operator.

post.description: Create a key date resource adding an organisation to a key date

403.description: Forbidden - you do not have permission to access this resource.

CustomField.description: A Custom Field, as found in several modules

id.description: The ID of the Custom Field.

help.description: Some text to help explain the purpose of the field.
help.example: Tick if you would like to receive the weekly newsletter or not.

options.description: Field types checkbox, radio or select - will contain options for the field

name.example: Yes I would love to receive the newsletter!

required.description: Whether the field is required or not.

settings.description: Settings relating to My, Embed and Connect.

my.description: My ChurchSuite and My Consent settings.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in My.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in My.

required.description: Whether the field is a required in My.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in Embed.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in Embed.

required.description: Whether the field is required in Embed.

editable.description: Whether the field is editable in Connect.

viewable.description: Whether the field is viewable in Connect.

required.description: Whether the field is required in Connect.

created_at.description: Date and time the Custom Field was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Custom Field.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Custom Field was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Custom Field.

KeyDate.description: Key Date data, as found in several modules.

created_at.description: Date and time the Key Date was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Key Date.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Key Date was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Key Date.

visible_to.description: Who the resource is visible to. Null if there are no restrictions. If `just_me` is true, `user_group_ids` must be empty or not set. If `just_me` is false, `user_group_ids` must contain at least one User Group ID.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

KeyDateResource.description: A single Key Date resource - an instance of a Key Date for a specific resource and date.

resource.description: The resource that the Key Date resource belongs to.

type.description: The type of the resource,indicating whether they are a Child, Contact or Organisation.

resource_id.description: This is no longer recommended - please use `resource` to ge the resource details. The ID of the Contact, Child, or Organisation the Key Date resource belongs to, depending on which module you are accessing.

date.description: The date of the Key Date resource.

description.description: The description of this Key Date resource.

created_at.description: Date and time the Key Date resource was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Key Date resource.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Key Date resource was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Key Date resource.

date.description: The date of the Key Date Resource.

KeyDateResourceEdit.description: Edit a single Key Date Resource - an instance of a Key Date for a specific resource and date.

date.description: The date of the Key Date Resource.

description.description: The description of this Key Date Resource.

Label.description: Label data, as found in several modules.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Label was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Label.

LabelResource.description: A single Label Resource - an instance of a Label for a specific model

resource_id.description: The ID of the model the Label Resource belongs to, depending on which module you are accessing.

label_id.description: The ID of the label the Label Resource belongs to

option_ids.description: List of option IDs for this Label assigned to this resource

Member.description: A single Member from the Network module.

created_at.description: Date and time the Member was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Member.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Member was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Member.

Note.description: A single Note, as found in multiple modules.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note has been pinned.

visible_to.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

just_me.description: Whether the resource is visible to just the current user or not.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to.

created_at.description: Date and time the Note was created.

created_by.description: The user that created the Note.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Note was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user that last modified the Note.

content.example: Had a conversation about this on 12th of July.

pinned.description: Whether the Note should be pinned.

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to. Do not include in the request if there are no restrictions. If included in the request, only one of `just_me` or `user_group_ids` can be set.

just_me.description: The resource should only be visible to the current user

oneOf.description: Who the resource is visible to, or null if there are no restrictions.

user_group_ids.description: List of user group IDs the resource is visible to. You are only able to add user group IDs for user groups you have access to.

Organisation.description: A single Organisation from the Network module.

reference.description: The internal reference you use to identify the Organisation.

line_1.description: The first line of the Address

line_2.description: The second line of the Address

line_3.description: The third line of the Address

country.description: The country of the Address, in ISO3166 alpha 2 format

longitude.description: The longitude of the Address, to 6 decimal places

custom_fields.description: Custom Field responses for this resource

items.description: Custom Field responses for this resource

id.description: The ID of the Custom Field

field_type.description: A discriminator to determine the type of Custom Field this response belongs to.

oneOf.description: The raw value of a text, textarea, email, phone or date.
The UUID of the selected response for a radio or select field.
An array of objects which contains the UUIDs of the selected responses for a checkbox field. If no checkboxes are selected an empty array will be returned.

items.description: The UUID of the selected response for a radio or select field.

embed.description: Whether the Organisation is visible in Embed.

all_sites.description: Whether the Organisation belongs to all sites.

site_ids.description: List of all site IDs the Organisation belongs to.

created_at.description: Date and time the Organisation was created.

created_by.description: The user who created the Organisation.

modified_at.description: Date and time the Organisation was last modified.

modified_by.description: The user who last modified the Organisation.

num_results.description: The total number of results available

per_page.description: The requested number of results per page

next_page.description: The page number of the next page of results, if there is one
